positive: A symmetrical, repeating celestial botanical pattern composition. Central element features stylized crescent moons intertwined with elegant, detailed bioluminescent flowers and swirling constellations. Use high-contrast linework and negative space. Color palette must be restricted to deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, muted gold, and stark off-white lines. Graphic style should be neo-sacred geometry meets Art Nouveau etching, achieving a clean, sharp silhouette suitable for direct apparel printing. Focus on symmetry and seamless tiling possibility, presented as a singular, impactful graphic.
